# baccarat usage guide for AI agents

`baccarat` is a Telegram Baccarat game bot running as a single Cloudflare Worker
(Hono + Grammy). The Worker is a stateless HTTP/webhook front; the actual game ‚Äî
state machine, timers, and history ‚Äî lives in one **Durable Object per Telegram
group** (`BaccaratGameRoom`, keyed by `idFromName(chatId)`). Cards are Telegram
dice rolls (1‚Äì6), points are dice-sum mod 10, and finished rounds are persisted
to the DO's embedded SQLite.

Primary docs:

- README: ./README.md
- Design spec (authoritative): ./DESIGN.md
- Runtime config: ./wrangler.jsonc
- Domain types: ./src/types.ts

Part of the `@cdlab/projects-monorepo`; run all commands from the repo root with
`pnpm --filter @cdlab/baccarat <script>`.

## What it is

- **One Worker, two layers.** Worker layer (`src/index.ts` + `src/handlers/routes.ts`):
  `/webhook`, REST API, health/config ‚Äî stateless. Durable Object layer
  (`src/durable-objects/game-room.ts`): per-group game state, timers, storage.
- **DO addressing.** `GAME_ROOMS.idFromName(chatId)` ‚Üí stable per-group room.
  Routed internally by URL pathname on a synthetic `https://game.room<path>` request.
- **DO export.** `src/index.ts` must `export { BaccaratGameRoom }` alongside
  `export default { fetch: app.fetch }`, or the binding can't resolve the class.

## Request flow (trace /bet banker 100)

1. `POST /webhook` ‚Äî new `Bot(BOT_TOKEN)`, `createConfig(env)`,
   `registerCommands`, `webhookCallback(bot,'hono')` dispatches.
2. chat-guard middleware ‚Äî drop silently if chatId ‚àâ `ALLOWED_CHAT_IDS`.
3. `bot.command('bet')` parses type+amount, validates ‚â§ `config.maxBetAmount`.
4. `callGameRoom(env, chatId, '/place-bet', 'POST', {...})` ‚Üí DO `.fetch()`.
5. DO lazily `initEngine()` on first hit ‚Üí `engine.initialize()` (crash recovery).
6. pathname switch ‚Üí `handlePlaceBet` ‚Üí `engine.placeBet(...)` ‚Üí `storage.put('game')`.
7. JSON bubbles DO ‚Üí `callGameRoom` ‚Üí `ctx.reply(...)`.

Two entry paths into the DO: Telegram (`commands.ts` `callGameRoom`) and REST
(`routes.ts` `proxyToGameRoom`). Both end at the same DO pathnames ‚Äî the DO's
pathname switch is the single funnel; add new actions there.

DO pathnames: `/start-game`, `/place-bet`, `/process-game`, `/get-status`,
`/stop-game` (=`/force-stop-game`), `/enable-auto`, `/disable-auto`,
`/game-history`, `/game-detail`, `/health`.

## Game state machine (src/game/game-engine.ts)

`idle ‚Üí betting ‚Üí processing ‚Üí revealing ‚Üí finished` (`GameState`). Live game
persisted to DO KV `'game'` at every transition; auto-game flag in DO KV
`'autoGame'`. Guards `isProcessing` / `revealingInProgress` prevent double
work (advisory ‚Äî the DO is single-threaded).

- `dealCards` deals B1¬∑P1¬∑B2¬∑P2 via `rollDice`. Natural if either side ‚â• 8.
- Third-card matrix: player draws 0‚Äì5; banker draws 0‚Äì2, stands 7+, 3‚Äì6 depends on
  player's third card (3: any‚âÝ8; 4: 2‚Äì7; 5: 4‚Äì7; 6: 6‚Äì7; player stood: banker
  draws 0‚Äì5). See DESIGN ¬ß5.
- Winner = higher final points (mod 10); equal = tie.

## Dice & messaging (src/game/message-sender.ts, src/lib/bot.ts)

- RNG = Telegram `sendDice` `result.dice.value` (1‚Äì6); **falls back to
  `Math.random()` 1‚Äì6** if the dice API fails.
- All sends serialize through a **promise-chain lock** (`this.lock`), NOT a real
  queue ‚Äî guarantees dice‚Üíanimation‚Üíresult ordering, respects rate limits, and
  keeps running even if a task throws. `reset()` starts a fresh chain.

## Timers & recovery (src/game/game-engine.ts ¬ß7)

- Countdown (20/10/5s), betting auto-process, auto-game loop, and cleanup are
  plain `setTimeout` in a `Set` ‚Äî they DO NOT survive DO eviction.
- Correctness comes from `recoverGameState(now)` in `initialize()`: betting >30s
  past end ‚Üí auto-process; betting in-window ‚Üí re-arm timers; processing/revealing
  ‚Üí cleanup (stuck); finished + autoGame ‚Üí resume the loop.
- `safeProcessGame` arms a `globalProcessTimeoutMs` watchdog ‚Üí `forceCleanup` on hang.

## Betting, limits, payouts

- Bets accumulate per (user, type); response flags `isAccumulated`/`isNewBetType`.
- Caps are HARDCODED (not env): `maxBetAmount = 10000` per type (`src/types.ts`),
  `maxUserTotalBet = 50000` per user (`game-engine.ts`).
- Payout (`formatGameResult`): tie √ó8, banker/player √ó1, losers forfeit stake.
  Display-only ‚Äî NO persisted balance/wallet.

## Data model & storage (src/lib/storage.ts, src/types.ts)

- DO KV: `'game'` (live `GameData`), `'autoGame'` (boolean).
- DO SQLite: one table `game_records(game_number PK, chat_id, data JSON, end_time)`,
  `INSERT OR REPLACE`; history filtered by `chat_id ORDER BY end_time DESC LIMIT`.
- `GameRecord` extends `GameData` (drops `bettingEndTime`; adds `endTime`,
  `totalBets`, `totalAmount`). Game number = `YYYYMMDDHHMMSS` + 6 random digits.

## Config & bindings (wrangler.jsonc, src/types.ts)

- `createConfig(env)` is the single parse site (entry, routes, DO). Parses 7
  timing knobs (ms strings): `BETTING_DURATION_MS`, `AUTO_GAME_INTERVAL_MS`,
  `DICE_ANIMATION_WAIT_MS`, `DICE_RESULT_DELAY_MS`, `MESSAGE_DELAY_MS`,
  `GLOBAL_PROCESS_TIMEOUT_MS`, `CLEANUP_DELAY_MS`, plus hardcoded `maxBetAmount`.
- Binding: `GAME_ROOMS` (DurableObjectNamespace ‚Üí `BaccaratGameRoom`,
  SQLite-backed via `v1` `new_sqlite_classes`). `nodejs_compat` on. No D1/KV/R2.
- Env: `BOT_TOKEN` (required), `ALLOWED_CHAT_IDS` (optional; UNSET = all chats
  allowed), `API_SECRET` (optional; gates REST mutations via `X-API-Key`/`api_key`;
  NOT in wrangler.jsonc ‚Äî add as a secret).

## Gotchas for agents

- `DICE_ROLL_TIMEOUT_MS`, `DICE_ROLL_MAX_RETRIES`, `CARD_DEAL_DELAY_MS` are
  declared in `Env`/`wrangler.jsonc` but NEVER read ‚Äî inert. Don't rely on them.
  `MESSAGE_DELAY_MS` is parsed and echoed by `/config` but never applied to message
  pacing (only the two dice waits delay sends) ‚Äî treat it as inert too.
- `ALLOWED_CHAT_IDS` unset ‚áí open to every chat; `API_SECRET` unset ‚áí REST
  mutations unauthenticated. Set both to lock down.
- `BOT_TOKEN` sits as a plaintext var placeholder in `wrangler.jsonc` ‚Äî use
  `wrangler secret put BOT_TOKEN` in production.
- Grammy `Bot` is constructed PER REQUEST / PER DO init ‚Äî never cache/reuse one.
- Timers don't survive DO eviction; never add logic that assumes a `setTimeout`
  will fire ‚Äî make it recoverable from persisted `'game'` state (DESIGN ¬ß7).
- There is NO test suite. `build` is a `bun build` sanity check; the real deploy
  is `wrangler deploy`, not the `dist/` output.
- `deploy:dev` / `deploy:prod` reference `--env` blocks that DON'T exist in
  `wrangler.jsonc` ‚Äî use the plain `deploy` script.
- `/game-detail` needs a `?chatId=` (to pick the room) and a numeric game number.

## Common commands

```bash
pnpm --filter @cdlab/baccarat dev       # http://baccarat.localhost:3355
pnpm --filter @cdlab/baccarat build     # bun build (bundle-check only)
pnpm --filter @cdlab/baccarat deploy    # wrangler deploy --minify
pnpm --filter @cdlab/baccarat cf-typegen # regenerate CloudflareBindings types
```

After deploy, register the webhook:

```bash
curl -X POST https://your-worker.workers.dev/set-webhook \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"url":"https://your-worker.workers.dev/webhook"}'
```
